text:
is the fourth official guidebook for the Attack on Titan manga, written by Hajime Isayama. It was released in Japan on August 8th, 2017.

Contents

The Survey Corps
The Military Police Brigade
The Garrison
The Training Corps
The Royal Government and Its Associates
The Citizens of the Walls
The People Beyond the Walls
----
A Guide to the Titan-Inhabited Areas
What are the Nine Titans Who Gave Power to the Eldians?
Hajime Isayama Reveals how His Characters Were Born
Closing in On the Core of the Story: A Long Interview with Hajime Isayama
----
Column: Long Distance Enemy Scouting Formation
Column: Sannes, a Man Who Swore His Loyalty, Infatuated With the King
Column: The Cherished Happy Days of the "Wall Construction Corps"
The Yeager Family and the Survey Corps's Past as Seen by Keith Shadis
The Goddess's Orphanage
Tracking Ymir's Tumultuous Fate Until She Gained Her Freedom
From Zeke's Birth in Marley to His Attempt to Once Again Retake the Founder
Index

Trivia

The official English version erroneously calls the Founding Titan "one of the 'Coordinates' that connect these paths of the Subjects of Ymir," but it is actually .
